settings.heading: Dress for the moment.
settings.copy: Curated luxury rental for every invitation, with statement silhouettes styled on the body and cleaner product views when it is time to choose.
settings.note_heading: Desire on the homepage. Clarity once they start shopping.
settings.note_copy: The landing experience stays aspirational, then the collection and product templates switch to calmer framing so customers can compare dresses quickly.

settings.heading: Best dressed.
settings.copy: Homepage imagery stays editorial and expressive, while product pages stay clean and clear with ghost mannequin views for easy comparison.

settings.title: Choose your dress
settings.copy: Browse the curated edit and pick the style that fits the occasion.

settings.title: Select your dates
settings.copy: Book your rental window on the product page with confidence.

settings.title: Wear and return
settings.copy: Your order arrives ready to wear and goes back with a prepaid return label.

settings.title: Professionally cleaned
settings.copy: Prepared to luxury care standards before every dispatch.

settings.title: Prepaid returns
settings.copy: An easy return flow with Royal Mail included in the order.

settings.title: Curated luxury pieces
settings.copy: A refined edit selected for fit, condition and impact.

settings.title: Fuchsia satin
settings.copy: A sleek halter silhouette for evening events, birthdays and statement arrivals.

settings.title: Midnight navy
settings.copy: Volume, drama and rich colour for black tie dressing and standout entrances.

settings.title: Olive couture
settings.copy: A sculpted occasion piece for statement arrivals, gallery moments, and high-impact event dressing.

settings.heading: See the silhouette first.
settings.copy: Start with the clean ghost view, then open each dress to see the normal imagery styled on the body.

settings.quote: The whole experience felt polished from delivery to return, and the dress looked incredible in person.
settings.author: Yasmin, London

settings.quote: The site made it easy to compare silhouettes quickly, then the rental process felt genuinely simple.
settings.author: Sophie, Manchester

settings.quote: It gave boutique energy without the friction. The prepaid return flow made the whole thing stress-free.
settings.author: Amara, Birmingham

settings.heading: A rental experience that still feels elevated.

settings.question: What happens if the dress doesn’t fit?
settings.answer: Contact us as soon as possible and we’ll do our best to help. Depending on timing and availability, we may be able to advise on an exchange or the best next step.

settings.question: How do returns work?
settings.answer: Every order includes a prepaid return label. Once your event is over, repack the dress and send it back within the agreed rental window.

settings.question: Are the dresses professionally cleaned?
settings.answer: Yes. Every piece is professionally cleaned and quality checked before dispatch so it arrives ready to wear.
